decisions.briefing: Markets posted a mild positive session with NASDAQ up 0.4% and S&P 500 up 0.3%, consistent with cautious optimism. All three holdings (META, COIN, MSTR) carry momentum score 95 with bullish MACD crossovers and are trading above their 20-day moving averages — no reason to rotate. We are at the 3-position maximum and all positions have minimal remaining room under the 25% cap, so the $3,165.99 cash reserve sits on the sidelines until a position closes via stop-loss or profit target.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher Thursday as investors digested a mixed earnings season and stable Treasury yields, with tech leading modest gains. Crypto-linked names like Coinbase held firm alongside Bitcoin's continued recovery above key support levels. The neutral tone reflects a market in a 'wait and see' posture ahead of further economic data, with no single catalyst driving outsized moves in either direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週四小幅收漲，投資者消化喜憂參半的財報季數據及相對平穩的美債殖利率走勢，科技股引領溫和上揚。隨著比特幣維持在關鍵支撐位之上持續回暖，Coinbase等加密貨幣概念股同步走穩。整體市場呈現觀望格局，在更多經濟數據公布前缺乏單一明確催化劑，指數雙向波動均受壓抑。

sources.headline: Tech stocks lead modest Wall Street gains as earnings season continues
Bitcoin holds key support as crypto stocks outperform broader market

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Position sizing is the rule that limits how much of your total portfolio you put into any single stock. In this portfolio, that cap is 25%. Even though we have $3,165 in cash and bullish signals everywhere, we cannot open a fourth position (max 3) or meaningfully add to existing ones — they are all near the 25% ceiling. Proper position sizing protects you from a single bad trade wiping out your account.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 倉位管理是指限制單一股票在總投資組合中佔比的原則。本投資組合設定上限為25%。儘管帳戶現有$3,165現金且各標的技術信號偏多，但因已持有3個倉位（上限）且各持股市值均接近25%上限，無法再加碼或新開倉位。嚴格的倉位管理能有效避免單一虧損交易對整體資產造成致命打擊。
